specimen_id.description: UUID of the specimen to append to the sheet.

details.description: Optional structured detail; shape varies by error code.

message.description: Human-readable error message; not used for client branching.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page; null at end of results.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes; null when unset.

template.description: Avery-style template identifier; see GET /api/v1/qr-sheet for the supported vocabulary.

A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

content_type.description: Content-Type stored on the underlying file.

file_id.description: UUID of the underlying files row; also the key suffix in object storage.

body_md.description: Raw markdown source (editable for typo fixes).

created_at.description: RFC 3339 creation timestamp; immutable after creation.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

attribution.description: Required when source='mindat' per Mindat's CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 terms; null otherwise.

author_id.description: UUID of the user who created the row (CONTRACT.md §13).

data.description: Pre-fill payload for the specimen form (design §2 MineralData).

mindat_id.description: Mindat geomaterial id; null for source='user'.

name.description: Canonical mineral name; unique across all rows.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

name.description: New display name; omit to leave unchanged.

notes.description: New notes; omit to leave unchanged. Pass JSON null to clear.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

body_md.description: New markdown source. Omit to leave unchanged.

created_at.description: REJECTED. created_at is immutable per design §2; supplying any value (including the existing one) returns 400.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

kind.description: New photo kind; omit to leave unchanged.

position.description: New manual ordering position; omit to leave unchanged.

taken_at.description: New taken_at; pass null to clear, omit to leave unchanged.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

catalog_number.description: Omit to leave unchanged; pass null to clear.

main_image_id.description: File id of the photo to designate as the specimen's main image (mi-m8q). Must be the file_id of an existing photo on this specimen, or the request is rejected with 422. To revert to the first-by-position fallback, delete the underlying photo — ON DELETE SET NULL handles the cleanup.

type.description: Sending a value other than the stored type is rejected with 409 (immutable per design §2).

type_data.description: Top-level merge: present keys overwrite, explicit null clears, omitted keys preserved.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

byte_size.description: Byte size of the stored original (post EXIF filter).

content_type.description: Content-Type stored on the original file.

file_id.description: UUID of the underlying files row.

kind.description: Lighting condition the photo was taken under: visible, uv_sw (shortwave UV), uv_mw (midwave UV), uv_lw (longwave UV), or other.

position.description: Manual ordering; 1-indexed within the specimen's photos.

sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the stored original bytes.

taken_at.description: When the photo was taken; defaulted from EXIF DateTimeOriginal when not provided.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

email.description: Email from the JWT claim, persisted at first-login.

pending.description: Profile-setup-required flag; always false on a successful response.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

display_name.description: Public display name; required, 1–80 characters, trimmed.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

collector_ids.description: Ordered list of collector UUIDs. Array index becomes the chain position (1-indexed). Pass an empty array to clear the chain.

added_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp the specimen was added to the sheet.

thumbnail_url.description: Path to the specimen's first photo thumbnail; null when the specimen has no photos.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

id.description: UUIDv7 primary key of the sheet.

page_count.description: Number of pages needed to print every specimen at this template's capacity. 0 when the sheet is empty.

specimens.description: Specimens on the sheet in position-ascending order.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

oidc.description: OIDC client config; absent when login is not configured.

client_id.description: Public OIDC client_id for the PKCE flow.

issuer_url.description: Keycloak realm URL the SPA uses to discover the auth endpoint.

redirect_uri.description: Absolute callback URL registered with Keycloak.

collector.description: The collector at this position in the chain.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

items.description: Collector chain in position-ascending order. Empty when the specimen has no collectors.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page; null at end of results.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

acquired_from.description: Where the specimen was acquired (free text). Omitted from the response when the per-field visibility resolution (mi-fo8 / CONTRACT.md §13b) denies the viewer access — absence is indistinguishable from 'unset', a deliberate privacy property.

author_id.description: UUID of the user who created the row (CONTRACT.md §13).

catalog_number.description: Optional human catalog number; unique across all specimens when set.

description.description: Markdown description; defaults to empty string.

main_image_id.description: File id of the photo designated as this specimen's main image (mi-m8q). Null means fall back to the first photo by position.

price_cents.description: Acquisition price in cents. Omitted from the response when the per-field visibility resolution (mi-fo8 / CONTRACT.md §13b) denies the viewer access — absence is indistinguishable from 'unset'.

type_data.description: Type-specific fields; shape governed by the parent type field.

info.description: Minerals collection management API. v1 surface: liveness, readiness, OpenAPI spec, docs.
info.title: Minerals API

get.description: Cursor-paginated list of collectors. Default ordering is `created_at DESC, id DESC`. Pass `?q=<text>` for substring match on name (case-insensitive). Anonymous callers receive an empty list — collectors are owned per-user with no public tier (CONTRACT.md §13 v2).

parameters.description: Page size (1-200; defaults to 50, values above 200 silently clamped).
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Page size (1-200; defaults to 50, values above 200 silently clamped).

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page (CONTRACT.md §10.3).
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page (CONTRACT.md §10.3).

post.description: Creates a new collector. Returns 409 when `name` is non-unique.

schema.description: URL of the newly created collector.

delete.description: Deletes the collector. Returns 409 when the collector is still referenced by `specimen_collectors`.

get.description: Returns 404 (not 403/401) when the caller does not own the collector (CONTRACT.md §13 v2 don't-leak-existence rule).

patch.description: Partial update; omitted fields keep their previous values. Returns 409 when `name` would collide with another collector.

delete.description: Deletes the journal_entry_files join row, the files row, and the MinIO object (best-effort). The DB transaction is the source of truth; if the MinIO delete fails the orphan-cleanup job picks it up later (deferred for v1).

parameters.description: File UUID of the attachment to remove.
parameters.name: file_id

schema.description: File UUID of the attachment to remove.

delete.summary: Remove an attachment from a journal entry

delete.description: Returns 409 when the entry still has attachments (`journal_entry_files` rows). Attachment deletion lands in C-2.

get.description: Returns 404 (not 403/401) when the caller does not own the entry (CONTRACT.md §13 v2 don't-leak-existence rule).
get.summary: Get a journal entry by id

patch.description: Updates `body_md` (and re-renders `body_html`). `created_at` is immutable; supplying it in the body is rejected with 400.

get.description: Returns attachments ordered by (position ASC, created_at ASC). v1 returns the full set in one response; pagination is deferred (entries have at most a handful of attachments in practice). Returns 404 when the caller cannot see the parent journal entry — sub-resource visibility is inherited (CONTRACT.md §13 v2).

post.description: Multipart upload (`file` form field). Single file per request. Allowlist-gated content types (CONTRACT.md §12), 100 MiB default cap, transactional MinIO + Postgres write. No image variants are generated for journal attachments — the photo-pipeline variants are specimen-gallery only.

file.description: The file to attach. Max size MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES (default 100 MiB).

schema.description: URL of the underlying file resource (download via GET /api/v1/files/{file_id}).

post.summary: Attach a file to a journal entry

get.description: Returns mineral species matching `q` (case-insensitive substring on `name`). DB is consulted first; if no match and a Mindat API key is configured, the server falls through to the Mindat API and stores any successful result before returning. Without a key, the DB-only result is returned (possibly empty).

parameters.description: Free-form name filter (case-insensitive substring match). Empty returns the most-recent rows up to the limit.
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Free-form name filter (case-insensitive substring match). Empty returns the most-recent rows up to the limit.

post.description: Used when the user enters a mineral that didn't match any DB or Mindat record. The server stamps source='user' and author_id from auth context. Returns 409 if `name` collides with an existing row.

schema.description: URL of the newly created mineral species.

get.summary: Get a mineral species by id

get.description: The machine-readable contract for this API, generated from registered handler types.

delete.description: Removes the photos row, the files row, and all three MinIO objects (original + display + thumbnail). Best-effort MinIO cleanup; DB transaction is the source of truth.

patch.summary: Update a photo's taken_at and/or position

post.description: Persists the caller's display_name and flips their account from `pending` to `active`. After a successful call the first-login gate (mi-2hf) no longer redirects this user away from protected endpoints. This endpoint MUST be reachable while the caller is still pending — it is the only protected route that bypasses the gate.

delete.description: Discards the active sheet and every specimen on it. Returns 404 when the user has no active sheet.
delete.summary: Delete the current user's QR sheet

get.description: Returns the active QR sticker sheet for the authenticated user, including the ordered list of specimens and the calculated page count for the chosen template. 404 when the user has no active sheet.
get.summary: Get the current user's QR sheet

patch.description: Switches the template on the active sheet. Specimen membership is preserved; only the page-count calculation changes. Returns 404 when the user has no active sheet.
patch.summary: Update the current user's QR sheet template

post.description: Creates an empty sheet with the supplied template. Returns 409 when the user already has an active sheet — use PATCH to change template, DELETE + POST to reset.

schema.description: URL of the newly created sheet.

post.summary: Create the current user's QR sheet

post.description: Renders the user's active sheet as a multi-page PDF sized for the chosen Avery template. Each specimen becomes one QR-coded label whose payload is the specimen's absolute URL on this server. Response is `application/pdf` with `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="qr-sheet.pdf"`. Returns 404 when the user has no sheet and 400 when the sheet is empty.
post.summary: Generate a print-ready PDF of the current user's QR sheet

post.description: Appends the supplied specimen at the next free position. Idempotent — re-adding a specimen already on the sheet succeeds without changing its position. Returns 404 when the user has no sheet, or when specimen_id doesn't exist.
post.summary: Append a specimen to the current user's QR sheet

delete.description: Removes the specimen and repacks remaining positions so they stay contiguous. Returns 404 when the user has no sheet, or when the specimen isn't on it.

parameters.description: UUID of the specimen to remove from the sheet.
parameters.name: specimen_id

schema.description: UUID of the specimen to remove from the sheet.

delete.summary: Remove a specimen from the current user's QR sheet

get.description: Serves the PUBLIC_OIDC_* settings the SPA needs to drive the PKCE login flow (mi-5ew). The `oidc` block is omitted when login is not configured in this environment. Public endpoint — no auth required.

Cursor-paginated list of specimens. Default ordering is `created_at DESC, id DESC`. When `?q=` is present, ordering switches to `ts_rank DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC` and a cursor previously issued under default ordering is rejected (clients discard cursors when filters or `q` change). `?collector_id=` filters to specimens whose chain contains the given collector (mi-zv3). Anonymous callers see public specimens only; the DB scope filter does the rest (CONTRACT.md §13 v2).

parameters.description: Page size (1-200; defaults to 50, values above 200 silently clamped).
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Page size (1-200; defaults to 50, values above 200 silently clamped).

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page (CONTRACT.md §10.3).
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page (CONTRACT.md §10.3).

parameters.description: true returns rows with a catalog_number set; false returns rows without. Omit to disable the filter.
parameters.name: has_catalog_number

schema.description: true returns rows with a catalog_number set; false returns rows without. Omit to disable the filter.

parameters.description: Filter by collector: returns specimens that have the given collector anywhere in their chain (mi-zv3 / C-3).
parameters.name: collector_id

schema.description: Filter by collector: returns specimens that have the given collector anywhere in their chain (mi-zv3 / C-3).

parameters.description: Full-text search; when present, ordering switches to ts_rank DESC and any cursor previously issued under default ordering becomes invalid.
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Full-text search; when present, ordering switches to ts_rank DESC and any cursor previously issued under default ordering becomes invalid.

post.description: Creates a new specimen. Returns 409 when `catalog_number` is non-unique. The `type` field is immutable after creation (see PATCH).

schema.description: URL of the newly created specimen.

delete.description: Deletes the specimen. Cascades to specimen_collectors. Returns 409 when the specimen still has photos or journal entries (those cascades are deferred to B-3 and beyond).

get.description: Returns 404 (not 403/401) when the caller cannot see the specimen — anonymous and unauthorized callers receive the same response as for a non-existent row (CONTRACT.md §13 v2).

patch.description: Partial update; omitted fields keep previous values. `type_data` is merged at the top level. Sending a `type` that differs from the stored value is rejected with 409 (specimen reclassification means delete + recreate per design §2).

get.description: Returns the ordered collector chain for the specimen. Empty array when the specimen has no collectors. 404 when the specimen does not exist or the caller cannot see it — sub-resource visibility is inherited from the parent (CONTRACT.md §13 v2 don't-leak-existence rule).

put.description: Atomically replaces every link in the chain with the supplied collector_ids in order (array index = position, 1-indexed). Pass an empty array to clear the chain. Returns 404 when the specimen does not exist; 404 when any collector_id does not exist; 400 when the body contains duplicate ids.

get.description: Cursor-paginated list ordered `created_at DESC, id DESC` (CONTRACT.md §10.3). Each entry includes `body_html` alongside `body_md`. Returns 404 when the caller cannot see the parent specimen — sub-resource visibility is inherited (CONTRACT.md §13 v2).

parameters.description: Page size (1-200; defaults to 50, values above 200 silently clamped).
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Page size (1-200; defaults to 50, values above 200 silently clamped).

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page (CONTRACT.md §10.3).
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page (CONTRACT.md §10.3).

post.description: Creates an entry whose body is rendered server-side via the CONTRACT.md §17 markdown pipeline. `created_at` is server-set and immutable after creation.

schema.description: URL of the newly created entry.

post.summary: Create a journal entry for a specimen

get.description: Cursor-paginated list ordered by (position, created_at) ascending — the manual ordering the user controls. Returns 404 when the caller cannot see the parent specimen — sub-resource visibility is inherited (CONTRACT.md §13 v2).

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page.

post.description: Multipart upload (`file` form field). Server-side EXIF allowlist filter (drops GPS, XMP, MakerNotes per CONTRACT.md §12), display + thumbnail variant generation, transactional MinIO + Postgres write.

kind.description: Optional photo kind: visible, uv_sw, uv_mw, uv_lw, or other. Defaults to visible.

taken_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp; defaults to EXIF DateTimeOriginal when present.

post.summary: Upload a photo for a specimen

get.description: Single-page Redoc viewer that loads the OpenAPI spec from /api/v1/openapi.json.
Returns 200 with body "ok" if the process is alive. Performs no dependency checks.
Verifies database, storage, and schema version. Returns 200 if all checks pass, 503 with per-check detail otherwise.

servers.description: Same-origin (SPA proxy in dev, embedded SPA in prod)

tags.description: Operational endpoints: liveness, readiness, spec, docs.
tags.name: system

tags.description: CRUD for the collectors directory (mi-yvt / B-1).
tags.name: collectors

tags.description: Specimen photo upload, download, variant generation (mi-jpu / B-3).
tags.name: photos

tags.description: CRUD for the specimens catalog (mi-quf / B-2). type_data shape per design §2.
tags.name: specimens

tags.description: Per-specimen journal entries with server-rendered markdown (mi-y6b / C-1; CONTRACT.md §17 pipeline).
tags.name: journal

tags.description: File attachments on journal entries (mi-720 / C-2). Reuses the §12 upload pipeline; no variant generation.
tags.name: journal-files

tags.description: Mindat-backed mineral species lookup with DB-as-canonical-store (mi-dtg / F-1).
tags.name: mineral-species

tags.description: Per-user QR sticker sheet builder (mi-c78.1). One active sheet per user.
tags.name: qr-sheets

tags.description: Browser-facing runtime config (PUBLIC_OIDC_*) served to the SPA at startup (mi-5ew).
tags.name: runtime-config

tags.description: First-login profile completion (mi-2hf). Pending users complete setup here before any other protected endpoint becomes reachable.
tags.name: profile
